intent: Wire sync trigger events (mount, 30s, visibility, online/offline, beforeunload) and graceful offline handling for syncEngine. Create useSyncStatusStore and useSyncLifecycle hook.

appliedFixes.title: Wrong table key in registerStoreRefresh call
Test asserts wrong table name in registerStoreRefresh
appliedFixes.fix: Updated assertion and description to expect 'studySessions'

advisoryFindings: useSyncStatusStore has no unit tests (plan specified store test scenarios but they were only implemented for the hook)
fullSync on online event has no rate limiting — rapid online/offline toggling could hammer Supabase
sendBeacon payload will contain user data — endpoint must be authenticated when implemented
